title: Glacius, the Frozen Sovereign
description: Boss intro for Glacius in the Glacial Sanctum. A meta-aware ice dragon who has read the documentation while frozen.

lines: The air turns to frost. Ice crystals hang motionless in the dark.
A massive dragon of living ice unfurls from the cavern wall.

lines.speaker: Glacius
lines.text: You know what I've been waiting for?

lines.speaker: Glacius
lines.text: One for each difficulty. One for each 'perfect' run.

lines.speaker: Glacius
lines.text: And every single one of you does the same thing.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: How do you know about save files?

lines.speaker: Glacius
lines.text: I've been frozen here since the TUTORIAL. I've had time to read the documentation.

lines.speaker: Glacius
lines.text: Let's see how your autobattle handles THIS.
